summary.zh: 出售：2卧，101㎡，17,990,000 泰铢。来源 DotProperty #7ea4366c199f-2abe-1532-9f2f-5ae6a089。
summary.th: ขาย: 2 นอน 101 ตร.ม. ราคา 17,990,000 บาท (DotProperty #7ea4366c199f-2abe-1532-9f2f-5ae6a089)

description.en:
PropertyScout ID [hidden phone]


Fully furnished pet friendly 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms condo for sale with a floorsize of 101 squaremeters, located on the 21st
floor, at The Lakes Bangkok building, in the popular Khlong Toei district near BTS Asok and near MRT Sukhumvit. Please contact us
to schedule a viewing.

Building features:
 * Building completed in 2004
 * Covered car park
 * Sauna
 * Relaxing swimming pool
 * Gym
 * Security cameras
 * Kids play area
 * Steam room




Haven’t found a place you love yet?

Phuket, Pattaya, Hua Hin, Koh Samui, Chiang Mai and many other locations. We are one of the leading real estate agents in Thailand
and can offer you all available rental and sale units.

Contact us today and let us find you the most suitable home or investment property for a great price - at no cost to you.

description.en: This property is a 34 SqM condo with 1 bedroom and 1 bathroom that is available for rent. It is part of the Ashton Asoke project in Khlong Toei Nuea, Bangkok and was completed in Oct 2017. You can rent this condo long term for ฿29,000 per month.
